docs.title: Q2 2026 Engineering Roadmap
docs.content:
Q2 2026 Engineering Roadmap

## Shipped
- Hybrid search (pgvector + BM25)
- Tenant RLS hardening

## In Progress
- Feature flags: gradual rollout infrastructure (see FEAT-44). Currently in canary.
- Per-tenant rate limiting (RATE-55)

## Planned
- Code graph ingestion via tree-sitter
- Wiki synthesis v2 with Gemini Pro

docs.title: FEAT-44: Build feature flag service with gradual rollout
docs.content:
Issue FEAT-44: Build feature flag service with gradual rollout
Status: In Progress
Assignee: nora
Description: Implement a feature flag service supporting canary (5%), staged rollout (20%), and GA (100%) tiers.

expected_edges.note: Q2 roadmap briefly mentions the feature-flags work in passing, referencing FEAT-44 without deep discussion
